# Cosigner Rights in Bankruptcy - Cosigner Release & Protection [2026] - Cosignerrights
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> What happens to cosigners when you file bankruptcy? Co-debtor stay, Chapter 13 protection, and cosigner liability. 2026 guide.

## About
cosignerrights.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Auto Loan Cosigner - Risks, Repossession, and Deficiency - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/auto-loan-cosigner.html
- Codebtor Stay in Chapter 13 - Protecting Cosigners During Bankruptcy - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/codebtor-stay.html
- Cosigner and Bankruptcy - What Happens to the Other Person's Debt - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/cosigner-and-bankruptcy.html
- Cosigner Protections by State - Know Your Rights - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/cosigner-protections-by-state.html
- Cosigner Release for Student Loans - How to Remove a Cosigner [2026] - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/cosigner-release-student-loans.html
- Cosigner Release Programs - How to Get Off the Loan - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/cosigner-release.html
- Cosigner vs. Co-Borrower - Know the Difference - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/cosigner-vs-co-borrower.html
- Cosigner Rights in Bankruptcy - Cosigner Release & Protection [2026] - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/
- Cosigner Liability Limits - How Much Can You Actually Owe? - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/liability-limits.html
- How to Protect Yourself as a Cosigner in Bankruptcy - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/protect-yourself.html
- How to Remove Yourself as a Cosigner - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/removing-cosigner.html
- Student Loan Cosigner Rights and Risks - Cosignerrights: https://cosignerrights.org/student-loan-cosigner.html
- Privacy Policy: https://cosignerrights.org/privacy.html
